cn_title: 《星际争霸2》多年来首次重大平衡调整震惊玩家
opus_summary: 暴雪为《星际争霸2》发布了PTR 5.0.16更新，包含大量平衡性改动，其中最引人注目的是将起始工人数从12降至8。这是该游戏多年来首次重大更新，社区反应强烈，玩家震惊又兴奋。

paragraphs.en: StarCraft 2 players have lost their collective minds after Blizzard Entertainment announced major changes coming in a new update.
paragraphs.cn: 暴雪娱乐宣布在新更新中推出重大改动后，《星际争霸2》玩家集体炸锅了。

paragraphs.en: Fans of the 2010 real-time strategy sequel took to its website to see new gameplay adjustments for what was probably the first time in years today. Instead of only finding bug fixes or mentions of standard server maintenance, patch notes for public test realm (PTR) update 5.0.16 revealed a laundry list of balance changes that will fundamentally change how StarCraft 2 is played.
paragraphs.cn: 这款2010年即时战略续作的粉丝们今天涌向官网查看更新，这大概是多年来第一次看到新的游戏性调整。与以往只有Bug修复或常规服务器维护不同，公测服（PTR）5.0.16更新的补丁说明中列出了一长串平衡性改动，将从根本上改变《星际争霸2》的玩法。

paragraphs.en: The impact of the update can be read in its first bullet point, which reduces the number of starting workers from 12 to eight. StarCraft 2 upped its starter worker count to 12 with the launch of Legacy of the Void in 2015 to speed up the pace earlier in matches. The years following the change have seen some players asking for an adjustment, and now, 11 years later, the change is here, and it's just one example in a page full of other tweaks.
paragraphs.cn: 这次更新的影响力从第一条就能看出——起始工人数从12降至8。《星际争霸2》在2015年《虚空之遗》上线时将起始工人提升至12以加快比赛前期节奏。此后多年一直有玩家呼吁调整，如今11年过去，改动终于来了——而这只是满页调整中的一个例子。

paragraphs.en: "How is this real?" one Reddit user said regarding StarCraft 2 PTR update 5.0.16. "Some of these changes are wild, I am so curious how they will feel."
paragraphs.cn: 「这是真的吗？」一位Reddit用户针对《星际争霸2》PTR 5.0.16更新说道，「有些改动太疯狂了，我超好奇实际体验会如何。」

paragraphs.en: "Holy s**t they did it," another said in response to the change in starting workers.
paragraphs.cn: 「卧槽他们真的做了，」另一位玩家对起始工人数改动回应道。

paragraphs.en: StarCraft 2 received its final major content pack with Nova Covert Ops in 2016, and despite retaining a solid audience in the decade since, it has largely remained on the back burner for Blizzard since. Now, there are so many changes on the way that players aren't exactly sure if the patch will result in a better or worse experience.
paragraphs.cn: 《星际争霸2》在2016年推出《诺娃隐秘行动》后就再没有过重大内容更新。尽管在过去十年中仍保持着稳定的玩家群体，它基本上一直被暴雪搁置。如今大量改动即将到来，玩家们也无法确定这个补丁到底会带来更好还是更糟的体验。

paragraphs.en: We won't know how update 5.0.16 will be received until after it makes it out of its PTR build and into the public's hands at an unspecified point in the future. What players are focusing on now, though, is that the update serves as proof that Blizzard still cares about breathing life into its classic RTS...for some reason.
paragraphs.cn: 在5.0.16更新从PTR测试服转入正式版之前，我们无法知道它的最终反响如何——正式推出时间尚未公布。但玩家们目前关注的重点是：这次更新证明暴雪仍然愿意为这款经典RTS注入生命力……出于某种原因。

paragraphs.en: "Some absolutely bonkers changes to basic mechanics, especially for a game in maintenance mode with little to no ongoing development besides this," another Reddit user said. "Very excited to see how this plays out, and I hope that they maintain the scale of changes, even if they have to iterate on/change plenty."
paragraphs.cn: 「对基础机制做出了一些极其大胆的改动，尤其是对一款处于维护模式、几乎没有持续开发的游戏来说，」另一位Reddit用户说道。「非常期待看到最终效果，我希望他们能维持这个改动力度，即使需要大量迭代和调整。」

paragraphs.en: So, why is Blizzard making a splash in StarCraft 2 for the first time in years? Unfortunately, we really don't know. Some speculate the tweaks arrive as a result of the game developer's renewed interest in some of its existing titles. Others believe it could signal a specific interest in StarCraft, which is rumored to receive a first-person shooter spin-off sometime in the future.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，暴雪为什么时隔多年突然在《星际争霸2》搞出这么大动作？遗憾的是，我们真的不知道。有人猜测这些调整源于开发商对旗下现有作品重新产生了兴趣。也有人认为这可能意味着对《星际争霸》系列的特别关注——据传该系列未来可能推出一款FPS衍生作品。

paragraphs.en: Players will have to wait to see if the new update is a sign of things to come.
paragraphs.cn: 玩家们只能等待，看看这次更新是否预示着更多内容即将到来。

subtitle: 老兵不死
